title: ourisia macrocarpa subsp. macrocarpa
intro: Ourisia macrocarpa subsp. macrocarpa, also known as the "Blue Mountains pepperwort", is a perennial herb belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to its high concentration of glycosides and other compounds. The health benefits associated with Ourisia macrocarpa subsp. macrocarpa include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat a range of health issues.
